desc: ClashManagerMarkResultResolvedCommand — shortcut for state → "resolved" with standard audit comment.
summary: ClashManagerMarkResultResolvedCommand — shortcut for state → "resolved" with standard audit comment.
usecase: Most frequent state transition — closing a reviewed clash.
precondition: Resolver_ClashId resolvable; current state permits transition to resolved.
logictree: 1) Resolver_ClashId required. 2) Build audit comment "Resolved by {user} at {utc}." + optional justification. 3) Delegate to UpdateResultStatusCommand with to_state=resolved. 4) Emit result.
